title: Bridge Essay: DLPFC-PPC-cTBS effects on metacognitive awareness.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Dashboard Diagnosis** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Metacognition — self-monitoring, metacognitive awareness, prefrontal-parietal insight circuits.

**DLPFC-PPC-cTBS effects on metacognitive awareness.**. Cortex.. PMID: 37523964. DOI: 10.1016/j.cortex.2023.05.022. BACKGROUND: Neuroimaging and lesion studies suggested that the dorsolateral prefrontal and posterior parietal cortices mediate visual metacognitive awareness. The causal evidence provided by non-invasive brain stimulation, however, is inconsistent.
